title: Linker-payload optimization for topoisomerase payloads: study 361
abstract: This study examines topoisomerase payloads through conjugation chemistry, drug-antibody ratio, and linker stability. It also discusses links to lysosomal escape and heterogeneity signal, alongside mechanism of resistance and validation cohort.
